phases.name: audit
steps: Glob robloxmaxx-api/** for all source files
Identify: existing routes, missing routes, auth completeness, Claude usage, payment wiring

phases.name: complete
steps: Generate missing route handlers using Claude API (claude-proxy endpoint)
Wire Stripe payment link into /upgrade route
Add SQLite schema migration for users + api_keys tables

phases.name: deploy
steps: Write Procfile + Railway config or Render.yaml
Push to GitHub repo (create if missing)
Update OPS/DEPLOYMENT_URLS.md with live API URL
